response.original_title: Tommy Emmanuel (CGP): Live at the Sydney Opera House
response.overview: Join the man considered to be one of the greatest living guitarists for a magical concert at the Sydney Opera House in his native Australia recorded in May 2023. The setlist showcases his most beloved songs like “Tall Fiddler,” “Mombasa,” and “Country Wide,” plus an iconic arrangement of “Classical Gas,” and a thrilling Beatles medley.
response.tagline: Join the man considered to be one of the greatest living guitarists for a magical concert at the Sydney Opera House in his native Australia recorded in May 2023.
response.title: Tommy Emmanuel (CGP): Live at the Sydney Opera House
